arts.ttl: Carter-Vickers has one 'weird' word he won't say as Celtic star reveals where Schmeichel and Hart are exactly the same
arts.sum: The Parkhead stopper is hoping to shut out Club Brugge and earn three more Champions League points

arts.ttl: Surprising Kasper Schmeichel skill that's made Celtic a Champions League force again
arts.sum: Cameron Carter-Vickers has revealed the Kasper Schmeichel skill that has helped to make Celtic a force in the Champions League again this season.

arts.ttl: Nicky Hayen: ‘Celtic are a complete team, but individually they also have a lot of quality’
arts.sum: Ahead of a crucial Champions League clash tomorrow evening, Club Brugge head coach Nicky Hayen was clearly not underestimating Celtic. The current Belgian champions head to Scotland full of confidence,…

arts.ttl: Club Brugge manager on 'the hand of Brendan' and Celtic ditching 'kick and rush' game
arts.sum: Club Brugge's manager has hailed the influence of Brendan Rodgers on Celtic and expressed admiration for how they have bucked a British trend.

arts.ttl: BBC Sport pundit says Brendan Rodgers has a player at Celtic who is the best in Scotland
arts.sum: That’s why Marvin Bartley feels Kuhn is the ‘best player in the country’ and how he is a ‘real game-changer’ on the flanks, as he told The Scottish Football Podcast. Celtic weren’t even at their best, yet they walked away with all three points and it looks like no one can stop them on the domestic circuit.

arts.ttl: 'Genuinely'… Pundit makes big Celtic Champions League prediction ahead of Club Brugge fixture
arts.sum: The Belgians are currently on six points and before both teams take to the pitch tomorrow, both Celtic and Brugge know that if they can get a Champions League win tomorrow night, a play-off place is virtually guaranteed. Cameron told The Big Scottish Football Podcast, “Club Brugge have had some mixed results in the Champions League, but I still think Celtic at home [can get the win].

arts.ttl: Rodgers expects 'another big examination' for Celtic when Club Brugge visit Glasgow
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers expects Club Brugge to be a tough opponent for Celtic.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers highlights what Celtic are expecting from 'difficult' Club Brugge encounter
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers on what Celtic expect from Club Brugge Brendan Rodgers and his Celtic side will be excited for the challenge that awaits them tomorrow when they take on Club Brugge at Parkhead.

arts.ttl: Who will win Celtic vs Club Brugge? Our writers deliver their predictions for Champions League showdown
arts.sum: The Record Sport team have had their say on the big one at Parkhead with the Belgians the visitors to Glasgow

arts.ttl: 'That's for sure'... Concerned Kris Boyd admits Rangers 'wish' they had four of Celtic's players at Ibrox
arts.sum: Rangers ‘wish’ they had James Forrest and three other Celtic players ‘in their dressing room’ Speaking after the weekend results, Boyd talked up James Forrest after the Celtic winger signed a new contract at the club last week.
